title: B9.8 local scan bridge and Operator Mode capability phase
summary: We're working on B9.8: local host scan bridge, hardware/system visibility, and Operator Mode local capabilities.
body: Current focus is B9.8 local scan bridge and hardware/system visibility for Xoduz. Xoduz is being expanded from a personal AI assistant and technical co-pilot into a safe local operator with read-only scan tools, PowerShell/CMD-backed host visibility, VS Code access planning, and Operator Mode slash commands. Mutation remains blocked unless Operator Mode is active, a specific slash command is selected, and the user confirms the pending action. No internet or external connectors are being added in this phase. Avatar re-enable/polish is deferred until local capability baseline is stable.

facts.statement: Current focus is B9.8 local host scan bridge, hardware/system visibility, and Operator Mode local capabilities.
Mutation actions remain confirmation-gated and are not allowed from normal chat.
Avatar work is deferred until local capability baseline is stable.

evidence: User directive: Implement B9.8.2 brain/config refresh for local scan and Operator Mode phase.
